source_or_gap: A final breadth review identified five system boundaries without distinct chapter owners and seven narrower technical gaps that belonged inside existing chapters.
chapter_action_policy: Admit exactly five distinct-owner chapters, integrate seven section-scale gaps into six existing owners, and restore the structural freeze after the atomic transaction.
merge_or_split_policy: Split only perception admission, embodied control, mixed-organization authority, population dynamics, and learned-objective integrity into chapters. Keep causal reasoning and uncertainty in World Models; scaling and emergence in Efficient ASI; instrumental convergence in Failure Modes; RAG in Virtual Context ABI; artificial moral status in Moral Uncertainty; and decision theory in Multi-Agent Dynamics.
boundary_decision_rationale: Each new chapter owns an independently testable transition with its own interfaces and failure modes. The section integrations modify an already owned mechanism and would create duplicate chapters if split.
external_literature_need: periodic refresh of fast-moving embodied-agent, multi-agent, and inner-alignment results
additional primary evidence on human-AI institutional field deployments
independent surveys for perception corruption, objective integrity, and artificial welfare as those fields mature
proof_or_test_backlog: run the five claim-specific natural and adversarial evidence campaigns named in the birth atoms
implement learned-objective integrity and observation-admission record schemas with expected-invalid controls
test real-time safety envelopes in high-fidelity simulation before any physical deployment claim
measure organizational burden and population-level failure rather than individual task reward alone
evidence_transition_precondition: prospective task, threat, comparator, rescue, evaluator, cost, and analysis contracts
source-disjoint natural workloads plus method-specific stress cases
independently implemented evaluators and complete negative/null reporting
accepted claim-specific evidence transition with no automatic chapter-core promotion
required_before_drafting: completed: primary-source inventory and source notes
completed: birth claim atoms and reader handoffs
completed: explicit non-claims and promotion ceilings
promotion_blockers: no local natural or adversarial campaign for any new chapter
no independent reproduction of external capability or safety results
no deployed observation, physical-control, organizational, population, or learned-objective system
no validated moral-patienthood or universal decision-theory conclusion
residuals: P2 exact materialization attempt or exact failure receipt remains first after the breadth packet
the historical six-chapter Round 16 atom pack remains open
W3, White-Box depth, and the current-reader freshness packet remain open
all five new chapters remain at argument support
next_action: Restore the structural freeze and return the empirical slot to the exact P2 capacity measurement and materialization attempt; route ordinary future ideas to the 66 existing owners.
non_claims: does not prove any new chapter's core claim
does not create empirical, formal, replicated, deployed, or SOTA support
does not close the historical Round 16 integration debt
does not authorize continuing chapter growth after this transaction
